impact: `.spin-anim` (1.5s infinite, base.html:571-572) and `.pulse-anim` (1.8s infinite, 574-575) run continuously: the spin appears on the sync indicator in the server bar, the pulse on the no-training dot in the dashboard skill summary, plus character location markers on the star map. The platform reference is explicit: "Always respect prefers-reduced-motion." Users with vestibular conditions get persistent on-screen motion they can't dismiss. Recommended: append `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .spin-anim, .pulse-anim { animation: none; } }` at the end of the base.html style block. One block, fixes everything.
title: No prefers-reduced-motion support for spin/pulse animations
